member.name: T:MatrixMath
member.summary: Class containing matrix math utility methods.

member.name: M:MatrixMath.Rotate2D(System.Double[0:,0:],System.Double)
member.summary: Rotates a square 2D matrix by a given angle (in radians) and returns the resulting matrix. Rotation is applied to the value of each element, not to the positions.
member.returns: The rotated matrix, or a matrix containing -1 if invalid input.
